title: Sense Device
description: A machine-learning detected electrical device in the Sense home energy monitoring system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the device assigned by Sense.

name.description: Human-readable name of the device, set by Sense or customized by the user.

icon.description: Icon identifier used to display the device in the Sense app.

is_on.description: Whether the device is currently drawing power.

power_w.description: Current instantaneous power draw of the device in watts.

energy_kwh.description: Cumulative energy consumption by time scale in kilowatt-hours.

WEEK.description: Energy consumed this week in kWh.

MONTH.description: Energy consumed this month in kWh.

YEAR.description: Energy consumed this year in kWh.

CYCLE.description: Energy consumed in the current billing cycle in kWh.

tags.description: Additional metadata key-value pairs for the device.
